data.title: Circles and OpenAI partner to create AI-native telco platform; aiming to boost customer experience and efficiency.
data.description: In a joint effort between Circles, a telecom technology company, and OpenAI, a partnership has been formed to revolutionize customer experience and enhance operational efficiency for telecom companies worldwide. The collaboration, announced on August 22, 2025, between the two entities based in Singapore and San Francisco, aims to leverage OpenAI's expertise. This alliance is set to drive positive transformation in the telecommunication industry on a global scale. This strategic partnership is expected to significantly impact the sector, as both companies join hands to innovate and enhance services in the ever-evolving telecom landscape.

data.title: South Mountain Creamery closes ice cream shop & pizza in Downtown Frederick to focus on expanding home delivery & wholesale.
data.description: A farmer-owned and operated creamery, South Mountain Creamery based in Frederick, Md., announced on Aug. 22, 2025, its decision to expand its focus on home delivery, wholesale, and farm experiences. The company has opted not to renew the lease on the South Mountain Creamery Ice Cream Shop & Pizza. This shift in strategy is driven by a desire to enhance these specific areas of their business.

data.title: Ramaco Resources in Lexington announces third quarter stock dividend for Class B Common Stock on Aug. 22, 2025.
data.description: Ramaco Resources, Inc., based in Lexington, Kentucky, revealed on August 22, 2025, that its Board of Directors has approved a stock dividend for the third quarter of the fiscal year 2025 pertaining to its Class B common shares. The company's stock trades on the NASDAQ under the symbols METC and METCB. This move underscores the Company's commitment to its shareholders and signifies a positive development indicating growth and potential for investors. The specific details of the stock dividend, including the percentage increase or the number of shares to be distributed, were not disclosed in the announcement. This decision reflects Ramaco Resources' strategic approach to enhancing shareholder value and optimizing returns on investments.

data.title: Nota AI plans KOSDAQ listing this year, with 'NetsPresso®' driving 160% CAGR business growth in past 4 years.
data.description: Nota AI, a Seoul-based company, is undergoing a swift Initial Public Offering (IPO) amidst a sluggish global market. This move highlights their competitive edge and business growth driven by their proprietary platform 'NetsPresso®'. Over the past four years, Nota AI has achieved an impressive 160% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR). The company's impressive performance showcases its robust expansion strategy in the AI industry.

data.title: Rochester Midland Corporation buys Decon Water Technologies, a provider of water treatment products - Aug. 22, 2025.
data.description: In Rochester, New York, on August 22, 2025, Rochester Midland Corporation, a prominent company offering route-based services and specialty chemical products for various industries including water treatment and food safety, revealed its acquisition of Decon. This move strengthens Rochester Midland's position in the market and expands its capabilities in providing technical services.

data.title: Southern mayors warn Trump Admin: Cuts to HIV/STI funding threaten public health, economic stability.
data.description: A group of mayors from the Southern region, organized by Ohio River South, has urged the Trump Administration to reconsider planned budget reductions and a potential restructuring at the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) as it would impact vital services. The coalition emphasized the importance of maintaining funding levels that directly affect the well-being of millions of Americans, particularly in the healthcare sector. The mayors have highlighted that approximately 30% of the population relies on HHS programs in the affected areas and urged for a collaborative approach to address budget concerns without compromising essential services.

data.title: AGCO, a leader in agricultural machinery, to present at 2025 Jefferies Industrials Conference on Sep 3.
data.description: AGCO, a prominent company specializing in agricultural machinery and precision ag technology, revealed its participation in the upcoming 2025 Jefferies Industrials Conference on September 3. The conference is scheduled to take place in Duluth, Georgia. AGCO, traded on the NYSE under the symbol AGCO, is recognized worldwide for its innovative designs and distribution of agriculture-related equipment. This event presents an opportunity for the company to showcase its expertise and advancements in the industry to a global audience.

data.title: AirNet Technology Inc. raises US$180 million in registered direct offering by selling 80,826,225 ordinary shares.
data.description: Beijing, August 22, 2025 - AirNet Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: ANTE) disclosed a new deal today, confirming the sale of 80,826,225 ordinary shares valued at US$0.04 each. The agreement was reached with investors, marking a significant move for the Company.

data.title: Bio-Thera and STADA will collaborate on biosimilar tocilizumab for treating inflammatory disorders.
data.description: Bio-Thera and STADA have announced an extension of their biosimilars partnership to include tocilizumab, an immunomodulatory monoclonal antibody that targets the interleukin-6 receptor. Tocilizumab is used to treat various inflammatory and autoimmune conditions. This agreement allows Bio-Thera to expand their portfolio with this critical drug, further solidifying their collaboration with STADA in the biosimilars market.

data.title: Winvest Group's subsidiary IQI Media partners with BioCalth to boost direct-to-consumer sales.
data.description: A company based in Reno, Nevada, known as Winvest Group Limited (OTCQB: WNLV), has recently announced a partnership involving their subsidiary IQI Media Inc. The parent company, which is an investment holding firm, manages various media, entertainment, and technology assets. This collaboration involves working with BioCalth International Inc., marking a significant development for the entities involved.

data.title: Metacon receives EUR 14.9M payment for delivered electrolysis plant.
data.description: Metacon, based in Stockholm, announced on August 22, 2025, that they have been paid EUR 14.9 million by Motor Oil Hellas for the successful delivery of ten 5 MW electrolysis stacks. This payment amounts to around SEK 166 million at the current exchange rate. The transaction marks a significant milestone for Metacon in their partnership with Motor Oil Hellas.

data.title: HEICO to release Q3 earnings Aug. 25, expected to report $1.14 EPS (up from 97 cents) and $1.12B revenue (up from $992.25M). Annual dividend yield of 0.08%.
data.description: HEICO Corporation, listed on NYSE as HEI, is set to reveal its third-quarter earnings on August 25 after the market closes. Analysts predict the Hollywood-based company will post quarterly earnings of $1.14 per share, a notable increase from 97 cents per share in the same period last year. HEICO is expected to report quarterly revenue of $1.12 billion, up from $992.25 million year-over-year. The company's Electronic Technologies Group recently acquired Gables Engineering, Inc., as announced on July 24. Additionally, HEICO's impressive performance has attracted investor interest in its dividends. Currently, HEICO offers an annual dividend yield of 0.08%, equivalent to a semi-annual dividend payout of 12 cents per share (24 cents annually). For more detailed information, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
Russia says agenda for a possible Putin-Zelenskiy summit is not ready

data.title: 2026 Toyota Prius now available at Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville in Vacaville, California for interested customers.
data.description: In Vacaville, California on August 22, 2025, Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville introduced the 2026 Toyota Prius to its customers. This hybrid model is known for its aerodynamic design and versatility. Customers interested in purchasing this vehicle can do so from Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville.

data.title: Saroasis Studios unveils Early Access release date for Fate Trigger game, following a successful Closed Beta Test with hundreds of thousands of players. Set for Q1 2026.
data.description: In Cologne, Germany on August 22, 2025, Saroasis Studios revealed the Early Access launch date for its main game, Fate Trigger, after a prosperous Closed Beta Test attracting hundreds of thousands of players post-launch. The Early Access release is scheduled for the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: Working mothers facing challenges with back-to-school chaos and workplace support in 2025; millions juggling tight schedules and childcare logistics.
data.description: In New York on August 22, 2025, it is reported that as the back-to-school season approaches, millions of working mothers are facing additional challenges. These include managing tight schedules, coordinating childcare arrangements, and dealing with longstanding issues regarding support in the workplace. This information is being shared by Mediaplanet.
